mappings.reason: Separate Enterprise Workspaces on Mobile End-User Devices requires the application of configuration profiles (e.g., Apple Configuration Profile) on mobile devices, which is the technical mechanism for MDM enrollment required by MDM-01, satisfying the profile configuration action for a subset of purpose.
Manage Access Control for Remote Assets enforces access based on configuration compliance, validating and enforcing the MDM enrollment requirement of MDM-01 for devices accessing internal resources.
